findings.evidence: `rg` hits show `normalizedChebyshevTLp (𝕜 : Type*) [RCLike 𝕜]` at line 216, but only `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` at line 255 and `orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` at line 273; roadmap target line 331 asks for `chebyshevHilbertBasis 𝕜 : HilbertBasis ℕ 𝕜 (Lp 𝕜 2 measureT)`.
findings.fix: Add `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp {𝕜} [RCLike 𝕜] (m n) : inner 𝕜 ... = if m = n then 1 else 0` and `orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp : Orthonormal 𝕜 (normalizedChebyshevTLp 𝕜)`; keep the real lemmas only as aliases if needed.
findings.issue: `normalizedChebyshevTLp` is public for arbitrary `[RCLike 𝕜]`, but the API only proves `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` and `orthonormal_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real`, so a downstream `chebyshevHilbertBasis 𝕜 : HilbertBasis ℕ 𝕜 (Lp 𝕜 2 measureT)` cannot use the exposed family without redoing the scalar-cast inner-product proof.

findings.evidence: `rg` hits show the formulas at lines 228 and 255 have no `@[simp]`; the only new simp characteristic lemma is `normalizedChebyshevT_def` at line 172.
findings.fix: Mark the integral and inner-product characteristic lemmas with `@[simp]` after adding the generic inner lemma, so downstream proofs can close normalized-mode inner products without unfolding the definitions.
findings.issue: The characteristic normal-form lemmas for the normalized modes are unannotated: `integral_normalizedChebyshevT_mul_normalizedChebyshevT` and `inner_normalizedChebyshevTLp_real` should simplify products/inner products to the Kronecker delta, but `simp` will not use them.

summary: The new normalized Chebyshev family exposes a generic `RCLike` `Lp` vector but only characterizes its inner products and orthonormality over `ℝ`, leaving the roadmap’s `𝕜`-generic consumer without the needed public API. The characteristic product/inner formulas also need normal-form automation annotations.
